name: openada
description: Open agent-EDA contracts and deterministic drivers for open-source EDA tools.

interface.longDescription: Help Codex discover, invoke, and reason over open-source EDA tools through bounded, versioned engineering results.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this EDA workspace and report available tools and PDKs.
Netlist and simulate this design with structured evidence.
Run the applicable DRC or LVS check and summarize violations.
